preconditions: User is not authenticated in the application session.
Browser cache and session state do not contain an active logged-in user session.

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state from the SPA landing URL
steps: Launch the application in a browser.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Allow the SPA Home page to finish loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button as visible interactive controls.

testCases.title: Verify all approved guest-state controls are visible and enabled on Home page
steps: Open http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user.
Observe the Home page guest-state controls.
Attempt to focus and interact with each approved control without navigation.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are visible, enabled, focusable, and appear actionable in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button opens the Login page from guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application opens the Login page or Login view from the guest-state Home page without requiring prior authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to the customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest-state Home page to the customer-search page.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to the vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest-state Home page to the vehicle-survey page.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to the survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Site survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest-state Home page to the survey page.

testCases.title: Verify Home page remains the same SPA Home resource in guest state
steps: Open http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user.
Observe the Home page structure and shared shell controls.
Interact with the Home button while remaining unauthenticated.
testCases.expectedResult: The application continues to display the same Home page resource in guest state without redirecting to a separate authenticated Home implementation.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page as a guest user.
Locate the Home button.
Attempt to click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible and enabled, and clicking it keeps the user within the Home experience without breaking guest-state navigation.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Notification button.
Attempt to interact with the Notification button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled for interaction in guest state without causing application instability.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Back button.
Attempt to interact with the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled in the shared Home shell while the application remains operational in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain actionable before authentication
steps: Open the Home page as a guest user.
Click Customer signup and return to the Home page.
Click Clean survey and return to the Home page.
Click Site survey and return to the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: Each approved guest-accessible feature button remains enabled and successfully navigates to its supported destination while the user is unauthenticated.
